Thanks for filing an issue for @eaeao/summernote-react.

Before opening:
- Search existing issues (open and closed).
- Check the docs: https://eaeao.github.io/summernote-react/docs
- Make sure you're on the latest version.

This is the React + TypeScript port (own engine, no jQuery). For the legacy
jQuery editor, use https://github.com/summernote/summernote instead.
-->

```tsx
// …
```
